body:
## Problem

SpeakableSpecification is implemented on drummer profile pages (packages/frontend/utils/speakableSchema.js) but NOT on article pages.

62 articles (/articles/<slug>) have Article JSON-LD (per #1064/#777) but zero SpeakableSpecification. The lead paragraph of every drum setup article ('X uses Y drums and Z cymbals') is exactly the kind of short, factual, quotable sentence that voice assistants (Google Assistant, Siri) read aloud in response to 'What drum kit does X use?'

This is an LLM/voice citation surface gap: the most direct answer to our primary search intent sits in article lead paragraphs, currently invisible to voice search.

## Fix

File: api/meta/[...path].js, ALBUM_ARTICLES return block (line 575-597)

Add speakableSchema to the return:
  speakableSchema: {
    '@context': 'https://schema.org',
    '@type': 'SpeakableSpecification',
    cssSelector: ['h1', '.article-lead', '.key-fact'],
  }

The SSR renderer (function renderSchemaTag near line 931) already handles articleSchema rendering. Add a parallel renderSpeakableTag function that emits the SpeakableSpecification block.

Alternatively: inline the SpeakableSpecification inside the Article @graph so it's one JSON-LD block.

## Expected impact
62 articles get SpeakableSpecification — voice search eligibility for all drum setup queries served by article content.

## Estimated organic uplift
- Google Assistant / Siri citation for 'what drum kit does [drummer] use?' queries
- AI Overview eligibility for article lead paragraphs
- Compounds with article FAQPage schema (line 596) already in place

## Quality gate
- SpeakableSpecification emitted in SSR HTML (verify via curl + grep)
- cssSelector targets the actual first paragraph with gear specs
- No regression on Article JSON-LD or breadcrumbSchema

## Verify
1. curl https://metalforge.io/articles/whats-in-mario-duplantiers-kit | grep -i speakable returns a match
2. Google Rich Results Test shows SpeakableSpecification on a sample article
3. Article JSON-LD still present and valid
4. Spot-check 3 different articles across different drummer genres

## Done
When 62 article SSR responses include SpeakableSpecification JSON-LD targeting the article lead paragraph.
title: SEO: SpeakableSpecification schema on article pages — voice search eligibility (62 articles)
